queue.ruleText:
rule "drunk agents antagonize more easily"
  intoxication.drunk(?SELF)
  => intent-antagonize(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 3

rule "repulsion drives antagonism"
  attraction.repulsed(?SELF, ?TARGET)
  => intent-antagonize(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 2

rule "exes bicker"
  exes(?SELF, ?TARGET)
  => intent-antagonize(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 2

rule "low impulse control provokes antagonism"
  impulse_control.low(?SELF)
  => intent-antagonize(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 1

rule "envy of a winning target"
  wins(?TARGET) > 50
  => intent-antagonize(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 1

rule "frustration from losing spills over"
  losses(?SELF) > 50
  => intent-antagonize(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 2

rule "selfish agents provoke others"
  selfish(?SELF)
  => intent-antagonize(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 1

rule "a selfish target invites antagonism"
  selfish(?TARGET)
  => intent-antagonize(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 2

rule "a gullible target invites mischief"
  gullible(?TARGET)
  => intent-antagonize(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 2

rule "disagreeable agents provoke more"
  agreeable.low(?SELF)
  => intent-antagonize(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 2

rule "a disagreeable target invites friction"
  agreeable.low(?TARGET)
  => intent-antagonize(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 1
queue.note: user: rules referring to the inner state of a target should generally not be proposed -- see skill update

queue.ruleText:
rule "liquid courage"
  intoxication.drunk(?SELF)
  => intent-flirt(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 3

rule "attraction drives flirting"
  attraction.attracted(?SELF, ?TARGET)
  => intent-flirt(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 4

rule "unresolved tension with an ex"
  exes(?SELF, ?TARGET)
  => intent-flirt(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 2

rule "impulsive flirting"
  impulse_control.low(?SELF)
  => intent-flirt(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 2

rule "drawn to a wealthy target"
  money(?TARGET) > 50
  => intent-flirt(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 1

rule "attraction makes you kinder"
  attraction.attracted(?SELF, ?TARGET)
  => intent-be-nice(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 2

queue.ruleName: close buddies are kind to each other
queue.ruleText:
rule "close buddies are kind to each other"
  buddy.high(?SELF, ?TARGET)
  => intent-be-nice(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 3

rule "self-control supports measured kindness"
  impulse_control.high(?SELF)
  => intent-be-nice(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 1

rule "unselfish agents are nicer"
  not selfish(?SELF)
  => intent-be-nice(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 2

queue.ruleName: pity for a target on a losing streak
queue.ruleText:
rule "pity for a target on a losing streak"
  losses(?TARGET) > 5
  => intent-be-nice(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 2
queue.note: threshold changed 50 -> 5, weight 1 -> 2; kept despite general target-inner-state caution

queue.ruleText:
rule "agreeable agents are nicer"
  agreeable.high(?SELF)
  => intent-be-nice(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 3

queue.ruleName: an agreeable target invites reciprocal kindness
queue.ruleText:
rule "an agreeable target invites reciprocal kindness"
  agreeable.high(?TARGET)
  => intent-be-nice(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 1

rule "drunken bravado"
  intoxication.drunk(?SELF)
  => intent-show-off(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 2

rule "showing off for someone attractive"
  attraction.attracted(?SELF, ?TARGET)
  => intent-show-off(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 3

queue.ruleName: showing off for a close friend
queue.ruleText:
rule "showing off for a close friend"
  buddy.high(?SELF, ?TARGET)
  => intent-show-off(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 1

rule "impulsive showing off"
  impulse_control.low(?SELF)
  => intent-show-off(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 2

queue.ruleName: a winning streak invites showing off
queue.ruleText:
rule "a winning streak invites showing off"
  wins(?SELF) > 5
  => intent-show-off(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 2

rule "flaunting wealth"
  money(?SELF) > 50
  => intent-show-off(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 2

rule "impressing a wealthy target"
  money(?TARGET) > 50
  => intent-show-off(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 1

queue.ruleName: selfish agents show off for their own glory
queue.ruleText:
rule "selfish agents show off for their own glory"
  selfish(?SELF)
  => intent-show-off(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 2

queue.ruleName: a losing streak breeds low-grade irritation
queue.ruleText:
rule "a losing streak breeds low-grade irritation"
  losses(?SELF) > 3
  => intent-antagonize(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 1
queue.note: graduated split of id 6, per user request (grumpy the more you lose)

queue.ruleText:
rule "repeated losses fray the nerves"
  losses(?SELF) > 5
  => intent-antagonize(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 1

queue.ruleName: a long losing streak curdles into open grumpiness
queue.ruleText:
rule "a long losing streak curdles into open grumpiness"
  losses(?SELF) > 10
  => intent-antagonize(?SELF, ?TARGET) += 3
